jobDescription: Who is Bird At Bird, we’re on a mission to make cities more livable by reducing traffic and carbon emissions with an affordable, convenient, and eco-friendly transportation option. We planted roots in Los Angeles, California. Now, our fleet of electric scooters is available to riders in cities around the world for short trips or the “last mile” of their journey. In our first year, Bird launched in over 100 cities and provided over 10 million rides. And we’re only just getting started. As a Sourcer on the Bird Recruiting team, you will work closely with Bird’s recruiters and hiring managers to develop strategies to find top technical talent. We’re seeking a dynamic Sourcer who brings a level of motivation and innovation to our team. You will be supporting the recruiting team by generating sourcing strategies, researching market trends, tracking industry movement, and delivering profiles of strong potential candidates to contact. This position will support a wide range of roles across the team, with a particular focus on technical positions within Engineering, Vehicle, Product, and Data. Responsibilities Incorporate advanced sourcing techniques to identify top talent Source passive talent through internet searches, referrals, networking, etc. Find, engage, and attract passive candidates through the use of Boolean, Linked In, and alternative search techniques Strategize different ways to build talent pipelines and execute on tactical research, referral generation, events, and sourcing campaigns Work closely with Recruiters and hiring managers to deeply understand the unique technical requirements of each position and team Regularly track sourcing pipeline activity to share with internal stakeholders Recommend and drive improvements that impact overarching recruitment strategies Monitor the industry for changes, movement, and trends Test and track outreach to passive candidates to optimize response rates and engagement Make recommendations to the role and job postings based on market feedback Requirements Bachelor’s degree or equivalent3+ years experience in technical sourcing or talent research 3+ years experience supporting executive-level clients or hiring managers Linked In Recruiter expertise is a must Qualifications Proven ability to track, meet, and exceed defined sourcing metrics Experience working with engineering executives on technical requisitions, including taking new requirements, creating job descriptions, reviewing profiles and updating pipeline progress Deep sourcing experience with a search firm or in-house recruiting team Experience developing innovative sourcing for difficult and niche positions Understanding of engineering and how it fits into various types of organizations Passionate about Bird’s product and able to speak to our technology and industry Good eye for talent, with the ability to quickly screen resumes to identify fit Excellent research skills with the ability to dive deep into searches for hard-to-fill requisitions Ability to contact and engage passive candidates Sharp interview skills with ability to screen for both technical and cultural qualities Solid tech and industry knowledge with ability to understand relevant tech skills, target companies, conferences and communities Strong interpersonal skills with ability to communicate well Culture at Bird We're an ambitious, smart, and open-minded group. Our employees are passionate about our mission, and eager to complete their work at the highest level. The office itself is up tempo and supportive, because we care about each other. People first, people. Perks up We want people to succeed at Bird, so we give our teams plenty of time off to relax and recharge. We also offer a generous employer-paid healthcare coverage, on-demand doctor visits, childcare support, a pre-tax commuter account for mass transit or parking, a wellness stipend, and more. Bird is the world Bird stands for a culture of inclusion. We celebrate different backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives —encouraging everyone to bring their authentic selves to work.  We have a diverse environment that empowers our team to feel comfortable when they voice their opinions. For these reasons and more Bird is a proud equal employment opportunity employer. We welcome everyone regardless of their race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or genetics, and we are dedicated to providing an inclusive, open, and diverse work environment. Sound like a place you’d like to work? Sweet. Let’s chat.
